body:
### FE Task: UI Implementation & Refinement - [ ] **Remove the background from the card component.** > **DoD:** The `
` element has no background color or image; the UI behind it is visible. **HTML Target:** ```html
Выведи hello world на rust
Write a parser for API responses and export reports

Enter to send, Alt+Enter to queue, Shift+Enter for a new line

``` - [ ] **Restructure layout: Move task history.** > **DoD:** The task history list is located strictly below the main input area in a separate, distinct visual block. - [ ] **Verify functionality against References.** * https://app.tana.inc/ * https://arena.ai/search * https://app.squidrouter.com/ > **DoD:** Features and UX patterns from the provided links are reviewed and applied where relevant. - [ ] **Implement Post-Execution Task View (Notebook Style).** * Reference: https://app.tana.inc/welcome/app?wsid=gk5sCIlK7Xyn * Prompt/Style: https://prosekit.dev/ > **DoD:** After task completion, the result view opens in a modal or page mimicking the Tana/ProseKit notebook interface (interactive, document-style). - [ ] **Implement Change Visualization (Diff View).** * Reference: https://diffs.com/ > **DoD:** Code or text changes are displayed using a side-by-side or unified diff view with syntax highlighting and clear color indicators for additions/deletions. - [ ] **Implement Horizontal Scroll for Solvers.** * Reference: https://codesandbox.io/blog > **DoD:** The solver list container allows horizontal scrolling, handles overflow gracefully, and includes smooth scrolling behavior.
title: Refactor frontend
